resume:
Jordan Lee — Machine Learning Engineer
San Francisco, CA

SUMMARY
ML engineer with 5 years building and deploying retrieval and NLP systems in
production. Strong in Python, vector search, and LLM application development.

EXPERIENCE
Senior ML Engineer, DataCorp (2021–present)
- Built a hybrid retrieval system (dense embeddings + BM25, reciprocal rank
  fusion, cross-encoder reranking) serving 2M queries/day; lifted NDCG@10 by 22%.
- Deployed LLM-powered features on FastAPI + Kubernetes; owned services end to end.
- Designed an offline eval harness (precision@k, NDCG, LLM-as-judge) for ranking changes.

ML Engineer, Startup Inc (2019–2021)
- Trained and fine-tuned transformer models (PyTorch) for text classification.
- Built data pipelines over Postgres and pgvector for semantic search.

SKILLS
Python, PyTorch, SQL, Postgres/pgvector, FastAPI, Docker, LangChain, RAG,
embeddings, information retrieval, evaluation, AWS.

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science

EDUCATION
B.A. Economics
